query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS resourceDownloads (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  resourceId INT NOT NULL,
  visitorId VARCHAR(255),
  email VARCHAR(320),
  ipAddress VARCHAR(45),
  userAgent TEXT,
  downloadedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
